description: Evals for create-brief — verifies triggering accuracy and functional behavior

evals.prompt: Create a brief for a user authentication feature
I have an idea for a new onboarding flow for our mobile app, let's start a brief
evals.description: Trigger via natural phrasing — user expresses an idea, not an explicit command

evals.prompt: Let's kick off the notifications feature — can you generate a BRIEF.md?
evals.description: Trigger using file output name as the intent signal
Should trigger brief-to-specs, not create-brief — downstream pipeline step

evals.prompt: Update the problem statement section of my existing BRIEF.md
evals.description: Should NOT trigger create-brief — editing an existing brief, not creating a new one
